summary: Frontend testing of Bulk Category Editor UI refactor - All 11 features verified. The BulkCategoryEditorSections component is working correctly with Categories, Filters, and Specifications tabs matching Navigation & Structure admin page.

minor_warnings.issue: React key warnings - duplicate keys for 'Natural Stone', 'Cushion Edge', 'Pressed Edge', 'Natural Edge', 'PEI 1-5'

1_bulk_category_editor_opens.details: Dialog opens when clicking 'Edit Categories' button after selecting products
1_bulk_category_editor_opens.evidence: Screenshot shows dialog with 'Bulk Category Editor' header

2_categories_section_displays.details: Categories section shows Main Category (Wall Tiles Only, Floor Tiles Only, Outdoor Tiles, Feature Tiles, Border & Trim) and Sub-Categories
2_categories_section_displays.evidence: Screenshot shows green Categories section with '8 available' badge

3_auto_detect_large_format.details: Auto-detect Large Format checkbox present with '(60x120, 80x80, 90x90+)' description

4_filters_section_displays.details: Filters section shows Room/Location (14), Style/Effect (23), Color, Special Features
4_filters_section_displays.evidence: Screenshot shows blue Filters section with '14 types' badge

5_auto_detect_color.details: Auto-detect Color checkbox present with 'Auto-detect from product names' label

6_specifications_section.details: Specifications shows Material, Finish (with Auto-detect), Edge (Rectified, Cushion Edge, Bevelled, etc.), Slip Rating (R9-R13, PEI 1-5), Thickness (6mm-20mm), Suitability (Wall, Floor, Wall & Floor)

7_auto_detect_finish.details: Auto-detect checkbox for Finish is present and functional

8_underfloor_heating_toggle.details: Underfloor Heating Suitable section with Yes/No buttons present

9_country_of_origin.details: Country of Origin shows flags: Italy, Spain, Europe, Poland, India, Turkey, Portugal, Vietnam, UK, Morocco, Brazil, China selected
9_country_of_origin.evidence: Screenshot shows flag emojis with country names

10_product_group_selector.details: Product Group selector (All Groups, Tiles, Underfloor Heating, Flooring, Materials, Tools) filters displayed options correctly
10_product_group_selector.evidence: Screenshots show different categories when switching groups - Tiles shows tile categories, Flooring shows Laminate/LVT/etc, Materials shows Adhesives/Grouts/etc

11_apply_to_products_button.details: 'Apply to 4 Products' button displayed at bottom of dialog

critical_code_review_comments: React key warnings: Duplicate keys detected for 'Natural Stone', 'Cushion Edge', 'Pressed Edge', 'Natural Edge', 'PEI 1-5' options. Consider using unique identifiers instead of labels as keys.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data (LEPORCE supplier, Alabaster Series)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Category Editor UI refactor verified. BulkCategoryEditorSections component at /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/components/supplier-products/BulkCategoryEditorSections.jsx is integrated correctly around line 5803 in SupplierProducts.js. All preserved features working: Auto-detect checkboxes, Underfloor Heating toggle, Country of Origin with flags. Session expiry is a KNOWN ISSUE - frequent re-login required.

preserved_features_verification.auto_detect_large_format: WORKING - checkbox in Categories section under Sub-Categories
preserved_features_verification.auto_detect_finish: WORKING - checkbox in Specifications section next to Finish label
preserved_features_verification.auto_detect_colors: WORKING - checkbox in Filters > Color section
preserved_features_verification.already_set_indicator: PRESENT in code - shows counts like 'Material: 2/4' for products with existing values
preserved_features_verification.underfloor_heating_toggle: WORKING - Yes/No buttons in Specifications section
preserved_features_verification.country_of_origin: WORKING - flag emojis for Italy, Spain, Europe, Poland, India, Turkey, Portugal, Vietnam, UK, Morocco, Brazil, China

known_issues.session_instability: Admin session expires frequently requiring re-login. This is a known issue mentioned in previous iterations.
